blended.narrative: Afton Alps is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
